<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-sìng]][[de:Feuer-Drache]][[hak:Piáng-sìn]][[ja:丙辰]][[ko:병진 (간지)]][[vi:Bính Thìn]][[za:Bingjsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-sîn]][[zh-yue:丙辰]][[zh:丙辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-sìng]][[de:Feuer-Drache]][[hak:Piáng-sìn]][[ja:丙辰]][[ko:병진 (간지)]][[vi:Bính Thìn]][[za:Bingjsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-sîn]][[zh-yue:丙辰]][[zh:丙辰]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurdraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-sìng]][[de:Feuer-Drache]][[hak:Piáng-sìn]][[ja:丙辰]][[ko:병진 (간지)]][[vi:Bính Thìn]][[za:Bingjsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-sîn]][[zh-yue:丙辰]][[zh:丙辰]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dragon|kanji=丙辰|romaji=hinoe tatsu|onyomi=heishin|p=bǐngchén|w=ping-ch'en|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=bing2 san4|j=bing2 san4|ci=pɪŋ sɐn|mc=pæŋ ɖin|oc-bs=praŋ ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as 丙辰''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|乙卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Yang Fire|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Dragon|ja|辰|1=chén|lt=Dragon (辰)|2=ja|3=辰|1=Dragon (zodiac)|lt=Dragon (辰)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Dragon (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16538966}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (火生土).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Dragon (丙辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: heishin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongjin (병진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Thìn

<!--
==
* Yang Fire Dragon (丙辰) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ひのえたつ (hinoe-tatsu)
***Onyomi: へいかのたつ (heika-no-tatsu)
***Onyomi: へいしん (heishin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongjin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Thìn

-->
==Years of Yang Fire Dragon==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 56 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Fire Dragon (丙辰)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 56|en|AD 56|WD=Q30962|lt=56 AD|1=AD 56}}
* {{ill|AD 116|en|AD 116|WD=Q24670|lt=116 AD|1=AD 116}}
* {{ill|176|en|176|WD=Q31620|lt=176 AD|1=176}}
* {{ill|236|en|236|WD=Q31547|lt=236 AD|1=236}}
* {{ill|296|en|296|WD=Q32139|lt=296 AD|1=296}}
* {{ill|356|en|356|WD=Q47937|lt=356 AD|1=356}}
* {{ill|416|en|416|WD=Q32402|lt=416 AD|1=416}}
* {{ill|476|en|476|WD=Q23478|lt=476 AD|1=476}}
* {{ill|536|en|536|WD=Q30322|lt=536 AD|1=536}}
* {{ill|596|en|596|WD=Q33877|lt=596 AD|1=596}}
* {{ill|656|en|656|WD=Q31088|lt=656 AD|1=656}}
* {{ill|716|en|716|WD=Q23531|lt=716 AD|1=716}}
* {{ill|776|en|776|WD=Q30690|lt=776 AD|1=776}}
* {{ill|836|en|836|WD=Q24957|lt=836 AD|1=836}}
* {{ill|896|en|896|WD=Q30465|lt=896 AD|1=896}}
* {{ill|956|en|956|WD=Q30168|lt=956 AD|1=956}}
|
* {{ill|1016|en|1016|WD=Q19247|lt=1016 AD|1=1016}}
* {{ill|1076|en|1076|WD=Q19440|lt=1076 AD|1=1076}}
* {{ill|1136|en|1136|WD=Q19599|lt=1136 AD|1=1136}}
* {{ill|1196|en|1196|WD=Q19747|lt=1196 AD|1=1196}}
* {{ill|1256|en|1256|WD=Q5502|lt=1256 AD|1=1256}}
* {{ill|1316|en|1316|WD=Q5744|lt=1316 AD|1=1316}}
* {{ill|1376|en|1376|WD=Q6282|lt=1376 AD|1=1376}}
* {{ill|1436|en|1436|WD=Q6369|lt=1436 AD|1=1436}}
* {{ill|1496|en|1496|WD=Q6699|lt=1496 AD|1=1496}}
* {{ill|1556|en|1556|WD=Q6590|lt=1556 AD|1=1556}}
* {{ill|1616|en|1616|WD=Q6788|lt=1616 AD|1=1616}}
* {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676 AD|1=1676}}
* {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736 AD|1=1736}}
* {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796 AD|1=1796}}
* {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856 AD|1=1856}}
* {{ill|1916|en|1916|WD=Q2087|lt=1916 AD|1=1916}}
* {{ill|1976|en|1976|WD=Q2480|lt=1976 AD|1=1976}}
|
* {{ill|2036 AD|ja|2036年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2036|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2036 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2096 AD|ja|2096年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2096|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2096 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2090年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=2090s|WD=Q845811}}
* {{ill|2156 AD|ja|2156年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2156|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2156 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2216 AD|ja|2216年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2216|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2216 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2276 AD|ja|2276年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2276|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2276 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2336 AD|ja|2336年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2336|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2336 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2396 AD|ja|2396年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2396|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2396 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2456 AD|ja|2456年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2456|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2456 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2516 AD|ja|2516年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2516|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2516 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2576 AD|ja|2576年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2576|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2576 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2636 AD|ja|2636年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2636|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2636 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2696 AD|ja|2696年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2696|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2696 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2756 AD|ja|2756年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2756|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2756 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2816 AD|ja|2816年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2816|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2816 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2876 AD|ja|2876年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2876|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2876 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2936 AD|ja|2936年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2936|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2936 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2996 AD|ja|2996年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2996|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2996 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}
==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Keng-chá]]
[[zh-yue:庚申]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=ja|丙辰|version=98658301|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Káng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Affenvi]]
[[de:Yang Fire Dragon]]
[[ja:丙辰]]

[[zh:丙辰]]
[[ko:병진 (간지)]]
[[fr:Dragon de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Drache]]

[[af:Houtaap (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Affeneen]]
[[en:Wood Monkey]]
[[fr:Singe de boisboishak]]
[[it:Kang-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:경신]]
[[vi:Giáp Thân]]
[[za:Gengceij]]
[[zh:庚申]]
[[ar:Yang Fire Dragon]]

<!--Yang Fire Dragon--><!--Yang Fire Dragon-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurdraak (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Bīng-sìng]]
[[hak:Piáng-sìn]]
[[vi:Bính Thìn]]
[[za:Bingjsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Péng-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:丙辰]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurdraak (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Bīng-sìng]]
[[hak:Piáng-sìn]]
[[vi:Bính Thìn]]
[[za:Bingjsaenz]]
[[zh-min-nan:Péng-sîn]]
[[zh-yue:丙辰]]
{{wikidata link|Q904721}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
